title: lithophragma heterophyllum var. scabrellum
intro:
Lithophragma heterophyllum var. scabrellum, also known as the rough-fruited bunchflower, is a plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family, characterized by its small, white flowers and distinctive, scabrous (rough-textured) fruit.

The medicinal properties of Lithophragma heterophyllum var. scabrellum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions.

The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a useful natural remedy for various ailments.

Lithophragma heterophyllum var. scabrellum can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
